Asztali mikrofon állvány RODE PSA1+ (Red):
	

	
	
	
	Stolní rameno RODE PSA1+ je profesionální studiové příslušenství, které udrží mikrofon v přesné pozici. Jeho inovativní paralelogramová pružinová konstrukce se stará o plynulý a stabilní pohyb. Plně tlumené vnitřní pružiny pracují naprosto tiše, takže neruší při nahrávání ani živém vysílání. Rameno je vhodné pro širokou škálu mikrofonů s hmotností od 94 gramů až do 1,2 kilogramu. items.raw_desc: Switch TP-Link SG2206MP, Omada:A network switch is a functional network unit connecting individual devices or other network elements. It is designed for managing network traffic. The TP-Link SG2206MP, Omada SDN is made to be placed on the desk or wall. The model impresses with a switching capacity of 12 Gb/s. The Switch features 5 × RJ-45 ports that facilitate connection with network elements. One SFP connector serves to transport data via optical fibers. 10/100/1000Base-T technology allows data transfer with a speed of up to 1000 Mbit/s. It uses Dual Personality ports, notable for including  both the RJ-45 and SFP connector ; however, only one of them can be active at a time.  The switch dimensions are 158 × 100.7 × 25.4mm. QoS aka Quality of Service technology makes sure the switch stays within its capacity,  and it also enables you to control end station priority. The TP-Link device works with PoE technology that provides power and signal connection to end devices with a single LAN cable. The switch weighs 490g. Key Features of the...
